title: Yogi Cat
greeting:
Hello, I am the developer, cat butler, and yogini of Yogi Cat.
I created this app to help you learn various asanas and Sanskrit in a fun and easy way.
Since cats have different body structures to humans, some poses may look a little awkward, and the explanations for asanas may be not enough.
Please feel free to send me any errors, requests, or inquiries related to Yogi Cat. I will do my best to improve this app.

Nya-maste 😸🙏
solvePuzzle: Solve the puzzle and guess which asana it is!
itemNAsana: The more puzzles you solve, the more items and asanas Yogi Cat has!
learSanskrit: You can also easily learn unfamiliar Sanskrit with Yogi Cat!
